description: Final-validation rerouting+PRACK case for the loadgen×e2e fusion. Binds the anchors the loadgen mux tags for the rerouting_prack load body (agent `bob2`, not the e2e `bob1`): the winning leg's reliable 183 carries Require:100rel + RSeq, alice PRACKs (RAck), and bob2's rerouted INVITE is properly tagged — i.e. the reliability markers survived the SUT's failover relay. Asserts nothing about the To URI (To-user correlation rewrites the To user-part with the per-call token).
